steps.name: 53. Open admin panel in a new tab (Tab 4)
54. Login to admin panel with admin credentials
55. Click "Tradesmen" in the admin sidebar menu
Wait for selector locator('table tbody tr').first()
56. Observe the Tradesmen table and confirm the list is loaded
57. Click the Eye-view icon in the first row to open the Tradesman record
Wait for selector getByRole('button', { name: /update verification/i }).or(getByText(/update verification/i).first()).or(locator('button, a').filter({ hasText: /verif/i }).first())
Click getByRole('button', { name: /update verification/i }).or(getByText(/update verification/i).first()).or(locator('button, a').filter({ hasText: /verif/i }).first())
